name: Pickled Ginger
recipeIngredient: 2 cups fresh mature ginger root, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the thinly sliced ginger in a tightly sealed jar.
2. Mix together equal parts vinegar, sugar, and water (in this case, 1/4 cup each).
3. Pour the mixture over the ginger, ensuring all pieces are submerged.
4. Seal the jar tightly.
5. Refrigerate for at least two days before consuming.
6. Properly stored, the pickled ginger will last indefinitely.
